description: Home Page Revamp - Redesign the home page with a two-column layout separating narrative summary from structured, collapsible insight cards. Focus on information hierarchy, scannability, and controlled information density.

userStories.title: Update insights generation with tailored prompts per section
userStories.description: As a developer, I need each insight category to have its own specialized AI prompt so that content is focused, high-quality, and relevant to that specific domain.
acceptanceCriteria: Create separate AI prompt functions for each insight section in lib/ai/insights.ts
Executive Overview prompt: focused on synthesis, identifying 3-5 key themes with article counts, and 3-5 emerging trends
Market & Competitive Moves prompt: focused on partnerships, acquisitions, investments, leadership/org changes
Technology & Architecture Shifts prompt: focused on agent systems, model architectures, infrastructure, compute evolution
Industry Impact & Use Cases prompt: focused on sector-specific applications grouped by industry (healthcare, finance, media, enterprise, consumer)
Economic & Policy Signals prompt: focused on regulation, geopolitics, supply chain, labor and economic impacts
Each prompt instructs the AI to return JSON with a 'summary' (1-2 sentences for collapsed state) and 'bullets' array
Create a generateStructuredInsights function that calls all prompts and combines results
Update the aggregation pipeline to use the new structured insights generation
Store structured insights as JSON string in the database
Maintain backward compatibility: if insights is plain text (old format), parse and display in a single card
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Foundation - must be done first. Each section gets a tailored prompt for maximum relevance and quality.

userStories.title: Home page layout redesign (two-column structure)
userStories.description: As a weekly newsletter reader, I want the home page to clearly separate narrative context from structured insights so that I can quickly understand what happened and then scan the most important takeaways.
acceptanceCriteria: The home page uses a two-column layout on desktop and tablet
The left column occupies approximately 60-65% of the available width
The right column occupies approximately 35-40% of the available width
The left column contains the Weekly Summary section
The right column contains the Key Insights section
The layout gracefully stacks into a single column on mobile, with Weekly Summary appearing before Key Insights
No content is removed compared to the current home page; content is reorganized only
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Weekly Summary placement and presentation
userStories.description: As a reader landing on the home page, I want the Weekly Summary to be prominently displayed on the left so that I can read a coherent narrative of the week without distractions.
acceptanceCriteria: The Weekly Summary appears at the top of the left column
The section includes a clear 'Weekly Summary' title
The section includes the selected date range
The section includes the generation timestamp (if available)
The summary text width is optimized for long-form reading (no excessively wide lines)
The summary content remains unchanged in meaning from the current implementation
The summary is fully visible without requiring interaction (not collapsible)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Key Insights section as a card-based system
userStories.description: As a reader who prefers scanning over reading long blocks of text, I want the Key Insights section broken into multiple insight cards so that I can quickly identify and expand only the insights that matter to me.
acceptanceCriteria: The Key Insights section appears in the right column
The section is composed of multiple vertically stacked cards
Each card is visually separated using elevation, border, or background contrast
Each card has a header, a collapsible content area, and a visual expand/collapse indicator (e.g., chevron)
Cards can be expanded or collapsed by clicking anywhere on the card header
Create a reusable InsightCard component
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Executive Overview insight card (primary card)
userStories.description: As a time-constrained reader, I want a single executive overview card summarizing the entire week so that I can understand the most important insights in under 30 seconds.
acceptanceCriteria: An 'Executive Overview' card is displayed as the first card in the Key Insights section
This card is expanded by default on page load
The card content includes a 'Main Insight' section with a 1-2 sentence synthesis
The card content includes a 'Key Themes' section with theme names and article counts per theme
The card content includes an 'Emerging Trends' section with short bullet points
The content of this card matches the current Key Insights content semantically
Collapsing this card hides all its internal sections
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Collapsible insight cards behavior
userStories.description: As a frequent reader, I want insight cards to be collapsible and expandable so that I can control information density on the page.
acceptanceCriteria: All insight cards except the Executive Overview are collapsed by default
Clicking an expanded card header collapses it
Clicking a collapsed card header expands it
Only the content area toggles; the card header remains visible at all times
Expand/collapse actions do not trigger page navigation or reload
Card state changes are animated with a subtle transition (max 200ms)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Market & Competitive Moves insight card
userStories.description: As a reader interested in industry dynamics, I want a dedicated card summarizing market and competitive activity so that I can understand strategic moves without reading every article.
acceptanceCriteria: A card titled 'Market & Competitive Moves' exists in the Key Insights section
The collapsed state shows a 1-2 line synthesized takeaway
The expanded state includes bullet points covering major partnerships, acquisitions or large investments, and leadership or organizational changes with strategic impact
Each bullet point is concise and independently readable
The card can be expanded and collapsed like other insight cards
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Technology & Architecture Shifts insight card
userStories.description: As a technically inclined reader, I want a card focused on technology and architectural changes so that I can track how AI systems are evolving beneath the surface.
acceptanceCriteria: A card titled 'Technology & Architecture Shifts' exists
The collapsed state summarizes the dominant technical shift in 1-2 lines
The expanded state includes bullet points related to agent-based or agent-native systems, model or system architecture changes, and infrastructure and compute-related evolution
The card content is distinct from market or economic insights
The card follows the same interaction patterns as other cards
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Industry Impact & Use Cases insight card
userStories.description: As a reader applying insights to real-world domains, I want a card focused on industry-specific applications so that I can understand where AI adoption is concretely happening.
acceptanceCriteria: A card titled 'Industry Impact & Use Cases' exists
The collapsed state shows a high-level synthesis sentence
The expanded state groups bullet points by industry (e.g., healthcare, finance, media, enterprise, consumer)
Each industry group contains at least one concise bullet point
The card is collapsed by default on page load
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Economic & Policy Signals insight card
userStories.description: As a reader tracking macro-level forces, I want a card highlighting economic and policy signals so that I can contextualize technological changes within broader systems.
acceptanceCriteria: A card titled 'Economic & Policy Signals' exists
The collapsed state provides a short macro-level takeaway
The expanded state includes bullet points related to regulation and policy developments, geopolitical or supply-chain constraints, and labor, productivity, or economic impact narratives
The card is collapsed by default
The card does not duplicate content from other insight cards
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Insight card content density and readability
userStories.description: As a reader skimming the page, I want each insight card to be concise and scannable so that I can extract value quickly without cognitive overload.
acceptanceCriteria: No insight card displays more than 2 lines of text when collapsed
No insight card displays more than 8-10 bullet points when expanded
Bullet points are sentence fragments or single sentences
No paragraph-style blocks appear inside insight cards
Typography clearly differentiates card titles, summary lines, and bullet points
The visual hierarchy remains consistent across all cards
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Final polish pass for card content
